rooms.name: Prison Entrance
rooms.description: A cracked stairway descends into an ancient underground prison sealed by rusted iron bars.

events.data: The air is cold and stale. Somewhere deep below, bones scrape against stone.

rooms.name: Guard Hall
rooms.description: Broken spears, old chains, and shattered shields litter the floor of this ruined guard post.

rooms.name: Storage Cell
rooms.description: Rotten crates and forgotten supplies are stacked against the damp stone walls.

rooms.name: Bone Chamber
rooms.description: Piles of bones cover the floor, hiding pressure plates beneath the dust.

rooms.name: Hidden Escape Tunnel
rooms.description: A narrow tunnel behind a loose stone wall leads upward toward fresh air and freedom.

events.data: You have found the hidden escape tunnel. Freedom is within reach.
